title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Crossword Bookstores

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Crossword Bookstores
jsonLd.description:
Crossword Bookstores is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
